artifact.core.orbOfVulnerability.bonus.n:
{Orb of Vulnerability}
Negates natural magic resistance of all creatures on the battlefield.
core.bonus.ADDITIONAL_ATTACK.description:
{Additional Attacks}
This unit can attack ${val} additional time(s).
core.bonus.ADDITIONAL_RETALIATION.descri:
{Additional Retaliations}
This unit can retaliate ${val} additional time(s).
core.bonus.ADJACENT_SPELLCASTER.descript:
{Adjacent Spellcaster}
This unit can cast ${subtype.spell} while standing next to its target.
core.bonus.ALWAYS_MAXIMUM_DAMAGE.descrip:
{Maximum Damage}
This unit always deals the maximum possible damage.
core.bonus.ATTACKS_ALL_ADJACENT.descript:
{Attacks All Around}
This unit attacks all enemies adjacent to the primary target.
core.bonus.BLOCKS_RANGED_RETALIATION.des:
{No Ranged Retaliation}
Enemies cannot retaliate against this unit's ranged attacks.
core.bonus.BLOCKS_RETALIATION.descriptio:
{No Retaliation}
Enemies cannot retaliate against this unit's melee attacks.
core.bonus.CATAPULT.description:
{Catapult}
This unit can fire at walls during a town siege.
core.bonus.CHANGES_SPELL_COST_FOR_ALLY.d:
{Reduced Casting Cost}
Reduces this hero's spell casting cost by ${val}.
{Magic Damper}
Increases enemy spell casting cost by ${val}.
core.bonus.CHARGE_IMMUNITY.description:
{Jousting Immunity}
This unit takes no extra damage from Jousting.
core.bonus.CPU_CONTROLLED.description:
{Automatically Controlled}
This unit cannot be manually controlled by the player by default.
core.bonus.DAMAGE_RECEIVED_CAP.descripti:
{Damage Limit}
No single attack can deal more than ${val}% of this stack's maximum health.
core.bonus.DEATH_STARE.description:
{Death Stare}
Has a ${val}% chance to instantly kill one living creature.
core.bonus.DEFENSIVE_STANCE.description:
{Defensive Stance}
After defending, this unit gains +${val} Defense.
core.bonus.DESTRUCTION.description:
{Destruction}
Has a ${val}% chance to kill additional creatures after attacking.
core.bonus.DISINTEGRATE.description:
{Disintegrate}
When this unit dies, it will leave no corpse behind.
core.bonus.DOUBLE_DAMAGE_CHANCE.descript:
{Death Blow}
Has a ${val}% chance of dealing double base damage when attacking.
core.bonus.ENEMY_ATTACK_REDUCTION.descri:
{Ignore Attack}
Ignores ${val}% of the attacker's Attack skill.
core.bonus.ENEMY_DEFENCE_REDUCTION.descr:
{Ignore Defense}
When attacking, ignores ${val}% of the defender's Defense skill.
core.bonus.FEARFUL.description:
{Fear}
Affected unit has a ${val}% chance to freeze in fear and skip its turn.
core.bonus.FEROCITY.description:
{Ferocity}
If this unit kills an enemy, it attacks ${val} additional time(s).
core.bonus.FIRE_SHIELD.description:
{Fire Shield}
Reflects ${val}% of melee damage back to the attacker.
core.bonus.FIRST_STRIKE.description:
{First Strike}
The unit retaliates before being attacked.
core.bonus.FIRST_STRIKE.description.bonu:
{First Strike (Melee)}
The unit retaliates before being attacked in melee.

{First Strike (Ranged)}
The unit retaliates before being attacked by ranged attack.
core.bonus.FLYING.description:
{Flying}
This unit flies and ignores battlefield obstacles while moving.
core.bonus.FLYING.description.bonusSubty:
{Teleportation}
This unit can teleport to any hex and ignore battlefield obstacles.
core.bonus.FREE_SHOOTING.description:
{Point-Blank Shot}
Adjacent enemies do not block this unit's ranged attacks.
core.bonus.GARGOYLE.description:
{Gargoyle}
This unit cannot be raised from the dead or healed.
core.bonus.GENERAL_DAMAGE_REDUCTION.desc:
{Damage Reduction}
Reduces physical damage from both melee and ranged attacks by ${val}%.

{Damage Reduction (Melee)}
Reduces physical damage from melee attacks by ${val}%.

{Damage Reduction (Ranged)}
Reduces physical damage from ranged attacks by ${val}%.
core.bonus.INVINCIBLE.description:
{Invincible}
Cannot be affected by any harmful effect.
core.bonus.JOUSTING.description:
{Jousting Bonus}
Each hex moved before attacking grants +${val}% damage.
core.bonus.KING.description:
{King}
Receives additional damage from units under Slayer spell.
core.bonus.KING.description.2:
{Advanced King}
Receives additional damage from units under Advanced Slayer spell.
core.bonus.KING.description.3:
{Expert King}
Receives additional damage from units under Expert Slayer spell.
core.bonus.LEVEL_SPELL_IMMUNITY.descript:
{Spell Level Immunity}
This unit is immune to spells of level 1-${val}.
core.bonus.LIFE_DRAIN.description:
{Life Drain}
Restores health equal to ${val}% of damage dealt.
core.bonus.LONG_WEAPON.description:
{Long Weapon}
Can attack across one empty hex. No retaliation.
core.bonus.LIMITED_SHOOTING_RANGE.descri:
{Limited Shooting Range}
Cannot shoot targets farther than ${val} hexes away.
core.bonus.MAGIC_MIRROR.description:
{Magic Mirror}
Has a ${val}% chance to redirect an offensive spell to an enemy unit.
core.bonus.MAGIC_RESISTANCE.description:
{Magic Resistance}
Has a ${val}% chance to resist a hostile spell.
core.bonus.MANA_CHANNELING.description:
{Mana Channeling}
Your hero restores ${val}% of mana spent by the enemy hero.
core.bonus.MANA_DRAIN.description:
{Mana Drain}
Drains ${val} mana from the enemy hero each round.
core.bonus.MECHANICAL.description:
{Mechanical}
This unit is immune to effects that only affect living and can be repaired.
core.bonus.MIND_IMMUNITY.description:
{Mind Spell Immunity}
This unit cannot be targeted by spells that affect its mind.
core.bonus.MORE_DAMAGE_FROM_SPELL.descri:
{Vulnerable to ${subtype.spell}}
The damage taken by this unit when hit by ${subtype.spell} is increased by ${val}%.
core.bonus.NON_LIVING.description:
{Non-living}
This unit is immune to effects that only affect living.
core.bonus.NO_DISTANCE_PENALTY.descripti:
{No Distance Penalty}
Ranged attacks always deal full damage, regardless of distance.
core.bonus.NO_MELEE_PENALTY.description:
{No Melee Penalty}
This ranged unit deals full damage in melee.
core.bonus.NO_MORALE.description:
{Neutral Morale}
This creature is immune to morale effects.
core.bonus.NO_WALL_PENALTY.description:
{No Barrier Penalty}
Ranged attacks deal full damage to units behind walls.
core.bonus.PRISM_HEX_ATTACK_BREATH.descr:
{Prism Breath}
This unit's attacks target all units immediately behind the main target.
core.bonus.RANDOM_SPELLCASTER.descriptio:
{Random Beneficial Spell}
Can cast a random beneficial spell on an allied unit.
core.bonus.RANGED_RETALIATION.descriptio:
{Ranged Retaliation}
Can retaliate against ranged attacks.
core.bonus.REBIRTH.description:
{Rebirth}
After death, ${val}% of this stack rises again.
core.bonus.RECEPTIVE.description:
{Receptive}
Beneficial spells cast by allies ignore this unit's immunities.
core.bonus.RETURN_AFTER_STRIKE.descripti:
{Strike and Return}
The unit returns to its initial position after performing a melee attack.
core.bonus.REVENGE.description:
{Revenge}
Deals extra damage based on attacker's lost health in battle.
core.bonus.SHOOTER.description:
{Shooter}
This unit can use ammunition to perform ranged attacks.
core.bonus.SHOOTS_ALL_ADJACENT.descripti:
{Shot Explosion}
This unit's ranged attacks strike all targets in a small area.
core.bonus.SKELETON_TRANSFORMER_TARGET.d:
{Skeleton Transformation}
The Skeleton Transformer will turn this unit into ${subtype.creature}.
core.bonus.SOUL_STEAL.description:
{Soul Steal}
Gains ${val} new creatures for each enemy killed.
core.bonus.SPELL_AFTER_ATTACK.descriptio:
{Cast After Attack}
Has a ${val}% chance to cast ${subtype.spell} after it attacks.
core.bonus.SPELL_BEFORE_ATTACK.descripti:
{Cast Before Attack}
Has a ${val}% chance to cast ${subtype.spell} before it attacks.
core.bonus.SPELL_DAMAGE_REDUCTION.descri:
{Spell Damage Reduction}
Reduces damage from all spells by ${val}%.

{Air Spells Resistance}
Damage from Air Magic spells reduced by ${val}%.

{Earth Spells Resistance}
Damage from Earth Magic spells reduced by ${val}%.

{Fire Spells Resistance}
Damage from Fire Magic spells reduced by ${val}%.

{Water Spells Resistance}
Damage from Water Magic spells reduced by ${val}%.
core.bonus.SPELL_IMMUNITY.description:
{Spell Immunity}
This unit cannot be affected by ${subtype.spell}.
core.bonus.SPELL_RESISTANCE_AURA.descrip:
{Aura of Resistance}
Adjacent units get ${val}% magic resistance.
core.bonus.SPELL_SCHOOL_IMMUNITY.descrip:
{Spell Immunity}
This unit is immune to all spells.

{Immune to Air Magic}
Immune to all spells from the school of Air Magic.

{Immune to Earth Magic}
Immune to all spells from the school of Earth Magic.

{Immune to Fire Magic}
Immune to all spells from the school of Fire Magic.

{Immune to Water Magic}
Immune to all spells from the school of Water Magic.
core.bonus.SUMMON_GUARDIANS.description:
{Summon Guardians}
At the start of battle, summons ${subtype.creature} (${val}%).
core.bonus.TRANSMUTATION.description:
{Transmutation}
Has a ${val}% chance to transform the attacked unit into another type.
core.bonus.TRANSMUTATION_IMMUNITY.descri:
{Transmutation Immunity}
This unit cannot be transformed into another unit by an enemy's attack.
core.bonus.TWO_HEX_ATTACK_BREATH.descrip:
{Breath Attack}
Attacks by this unit will also hit any unit positioned immediately behind the target.
core.bonus.UNDEAD.description:
{Undead}
Creature is Undead and is immune to effects that only affect living.
core.bonus.UNLIMITED_RETALIATIONS.descri:
{Unlimited retaliations}
This unit can retaliate against an unlimited number of attacks.
core.bonus.WIDE_BREATH.description:
{Wide Breath}
This unit attacks all units around its target.
core.seerhut.quest.heroClass.complete.0: Ah, you are %s.  Here's a gift for you.  Do you accept?
core.seerhut.quest.heroClass.complete.1: Ah, you are %s.  Here's a gift for you.  Do you accept?
core.seerhut.quest.heroClass.complete.2: Ah, you are %s.  Here's a gift for you.  Do you accept?
core.seerhut.quest.heroClass.complete.3: The guards note that you are %s and offer to let you pass.  Do you accept?
core.seerhut.quest.heroClass.complete.4: The guards note that you are %s and offer to let you pass.  Do you accept?
core.seerhut.quest.heroClass.complete.5: The guards note that you are %s and offer to let you pass.  Do you accept?
core.seerhut.quest.heroClass.receive.3: The guards here say they will only let %s pass.
core.seerhut.quest.heroClass.receive.4: The guards here say they will only let %s pass.
core.seerhut.quest.heroClass.receive.5: The guards here say they will only let %s pass.
core.seerhut.quest.heroClass.visit.0: You are not %s.  I've got nothing for you. Begone!
core.seerhut.quest.heroClass.visit.1: You are not %s.  I've got nothing for you. Begone!
core.seerhut.quest.heroClass.visit.2: You are not %s.  I've got nothing for you. Begone!
core.seerhut.quest.heroClass.visit.3: The guards here will only let %s pass.
core.seerhut.quest.heroClass.visit.4: The guards here will only let %s pass.
core.seerhut.quest.heroClass.visit.5: The guards here will only let %s pass.
core.seerhut.quest.reachDate.complete.0: I'm free now.  Here's what I've got for you.  Do you accept?
core.seerhut.quest.reachDate.complete.1: I'm free now.  Here's what I've got for you.  Do you accept?
core.seerhut.quest.reachDate.complete.2: I'm free now.  Here's what I've got for you.  Do you accept?
core.seerhut.quest.reachDate.complete.3: You are free to go through now.  Do you wish to pass?
core.seerhut.quest.reachDate.complete.4: You are free to go through now.  Do you wish to pass?
core.seerhut.quest.reachDate.complete.5: You are free to go through now.  Do you wish to pass?
core.seerhut.quest.reachDate.receive.0: I'm busy.  Come back not before %s
core.seerhut.quest.reachDate.receive.1: I'm busy.  Come back not before %s
core.seerhut.quest.reachDate.receive.2: I'm busy.  Come back not before %s
core.seerhut.quest.reachDate.visit.0: I'm busy.  Come back not before %s.
core.seerhut.quest.reachDate.visit.1: I'm busy.  Come back not before %s.
core.seerhut.quest.reachDate.visit.2: I'm busy.  Come back not before %s.
creatures.core.angel.bonus.raisesMorale:
{Increases allies morale}
Angels and Archangels increase allies Morale by one
creatures.core.azureDragon.bonus.fearful:
{Fear}
Enemy units have a 10% chance of freezing in fear.
creatures.core.boneDragon.bonus.decrease:
{Reduces enemy morale}
Bone Dragons and Ghost Dragons lower the morale of enemy units by one
creatures.core.devil.bonus.decreaseLuck:
{Reduces enemy luck}
Devils and Archdevils reduce enemy luck by one
creatures.core.halfling.bonus.lucky:
{Lucky}
Halfling's luck cannot be decreased below +1
creatures.core.marksman.bonus.extraAttac:
{Shoots Twice}
This unit can shoot twice.
creatures.core.nomad.bonus.sandWalker:
{Sandwalker}
Hero ignores terrain penalty on sand.
creatures.core.rogue.bonus.visionsHeroes:
{Spying (Heroes)}
Hero can see detailed information about enemy heroes.
creatures.core.rogue.bonus.visionsMonste:
{Spying (Monsters)}
Hero can see detailed information about wandering monsters.
creatures.core.rogue.bonus.visionsTowns:
{Spying (Towns)}
Hero can see detailed information about enemy towns.
mapLayer.core.surface.name: Surface
mapLayer.core.underground.name: Underground
mapLayer.core.unknown.name: Unknown
mapObject.core.hillFort.object.descripti: Upgrades creatures. Levels 1 - 4 are less expensive than in associated town.
spell.core.acidBreath.description.none:
{Acid breath}

The breath reduces the target stack's defense by 3, and has 20% chance to cause additional damage amount of 25 points per attacking unit.
spell.core.age.description.none:
{Age}

Aging lowers the maximum health of every creature in the target stack down to 50% for three combat rounds.
spell.core.bind.description.none:
{Bind}

Targeted unit is bound to the ground, unable to move until the stack that entangled them moves or perishes.
spell.core.castleMoat.name: Moat
spell.core.castleMoatTrigger.name: Moat
spell.core.catapultShot.name: Catapult shot
spell.core.cyclopsShot.name: Siege shot
spell.core.deathCloud.description.none:
{Death Cloud}

In addition to normal ranged attack damage in target hex, the death cloud also affects all 6 adjacent hexes around the target hex dealing damage to all living creatures in the radius.
spell.core.disease.description.none:
{Disease}

The living target becomes ill, thus having their attack and defense values reduced by two for a period of three rounds.
spell.core.dispelHelpful.description.non:
{Dispel Helpful Spells}

Removes all spell effects from the targeted unit.
spell.core.dungeonMoat.name: Boiling Oil
spell.core.dungeonMoatTrigger.name: Boiling Oil
spell.core.fireWallTrigger.name: Fire Wall
spell.core.firstAid.name: First Aid
spell.core.fortressMoat.name: Boiling Tar
spell.core.fortressMoatTrigger.name: Boiling Tar
spell.core.infernoMoat.name: Lava
spell.core.infernoMoatTrigger.name: Lava
spell.core.landMineTrigger.name: Land Mine
spell.core.necropolisMoat.name: Boneyard
spell.core.necropolisMoatTrigger.name: Boneyard
spell.core.paralyze.description.none:
{Paralyze}

The target is paralyzed and forgo their turn for the remainder of the current combat round and the two combat rounds thereafter, unless they are attacked meanwhile. Paralyzed creatures take full damage from attacks, but retaliate at only a quarter of their strength.
spell.core.poison.description.none:
{Poison}

When poisoned, the target stack's maximum health is decreased by 10% for every combat round for three rounds. After three rounds, the creature is no longer poisoned, but the maximum health remains decreased.
spell.core.rampartMoat.name: Brambles
spell.core.rampartMoatTrigger.name: Brambles
spell.core.stoneGaze.description.none:
{Stone Gaze}

The targeted unit is petrified and cannot move for three combat rounds. When attacked, it takes half damage (both melee and ranged attacks) and retaliates at full strength.
spell.core.strongholdMoat.name: Wooden Spikes
spell.core.strongholdMoatTrigger.name: Wooden Spikes
spell.core.summonDemons.name: Summon Demons
spell.core.thunderbolt.description.none:
{Thunderbolt}

When the stack attacks, the there is a 20% chance that a lightning strike occurs before the enemy has a chance to retaliate. If if occurs, the lightning strike deals damage equal to ten times the number of attacking Thunderbirds.
spell.core.towerMoat.name: Land Mine
spellSchool.core.air.name: Air
spellSchool.core.earth.name: Earth
spellSchool.core.fire.name: Fire
spellSchool.core.water.name: Water
vcmi.adventureMap.confirmQuickLoadGame: Are you sure you want to load the quicksave?
vcmi.adventureMap.confirmRestartGame: Are you sure you want to restart the game?
vcmi.adventureMap.dwelling2:
{%s}

Would you like to recruit %s or %s?
vcmi.adventureMap.dwelling3:
{%s}

Would you like to recruit %s, %s, or %s?
vcmi.adventureMap.dwelling5:
{%s}

Would you like to recruit %s, %s, %s, %s, or %s?
vcmi.adventureMap.dwelling6:
{%s}

Would you like to recruit %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, or %s?
vcmi.adventureMap.monsterThreat.title: Threat:
vcmi.adventureMap.moveCostDetails: Moving here will cost {%TOTAL} points in total ({%TURNS} turns and {%POINTS} points). {%REMAINING} points will remain after moving.
vcmi.adventureMap.moveCostDetailsNoTurns: Moving here will cost {%POINTS} points. {%REMAINING} points will remain after moving.
vcmi.adventureMap.noTownWithTavern: There are no available towns with taverns!
vcmi.adventureMap.quickLoad.help:
{Quick Load}

Loads the game state from a quick save slot.
vcmi.adventureMap.quickSave.help:
{Quick Save}

Saves the current game state to a quick save slot.
vcmi.adventureMap.replayOpponentTurnNotI: Sorry, replay opponent turn is not implemented yet!
vcmi.adventureMap.revisitObject.help:
{Revisit Object}

If a hero currently stands on a Map Object, he can revisit the location.
vcmi.adventureMap.search.help:
{Search Map Object}

Allows you to search for an object on the adventure map and display its location.
vcmi.adventureMap.search.tip: Select object to find on the map.
vcmi.adventureMap.spellUnknownProblem: There is an unknown problem with this spell! No more information is available.
vcmi.adventureOptions.borderScroll.help:
{Border Scrolling}

Scroll adventure map when cursor is adjacent to window edge. Can be disabled by holding down CTRL key.
{Always Show Movement Cost}

Always show movement points data in status bar information (Instead of viewing it only while you hold down ALT key).
vcmi.adventureOptions.hideBackground.hel:
{Hide Background}

Hide the adventuremap in the background and show a texture instead.
vcmi.adventureOptions.infoBarCreatureMan:
{Info Panel Creature Management}

Allows rearranging creatures in info panel instead of cycling between default components.
vcmi.adventureOptions.infoBarPick.help:
{Show Messages in Info Panel}

Whenever possible, game messages from visiting map objects will be shown in the info panel, instead of popping up in a separate window.
vcmi.adventureOptions.leftButtonDrag.hel:
{Left Click Drag}

When enabled, moving mouse with left button pressed will drag adventure map view.
vcmi.adventureOptions.mapScrollSpeed1.he: Set the map scrolling speed to very slow.
vcmi.adventureOptions.mapScrollSpeed1.ho: Set the map scrolling speed to very slow.
vcmi.adventureOptions.mapScrollSpeed5.he: Set the map scrolling speed to very fast.
vcmi.adventureOptions.mapScrollSpeed5.ho: Set the map scrolling speed to very fast.
vcmi.adventureOptions.mapScrollSpeed6.he: Set the map scrolling speed to instantaneous.
vcmi.adventureOptions.mapScrollSpeed6.ho: Set the map scrolling speed to instantaneous.
{Show Heroes On Minimap}

Show addition icon for all heroes visible on minimap, making them more easy to see on large maps.
{Numeric Creature Quantities}

Show the approximate quantities of enemy creatures in the numeric A-B format.
vcmi.adventureOptions.rightButtonDrag.he:
{Right Click Drag}

When enabled, moving mouse with right button pressed will drag adventure map view.
vcmi.adventureOptions.showGrid.help:
{Show Grid}

Show the grid overlay, highlighting the borders between adventure map tiles.
vcmi.adventureOptions.skipAdventureMapAn:
{Skip fading effects}

When enabled, Skips object fadeout and similar effects (resource collection, ship embark etc). Makes UI more reactive in some cases at the expense of aesthetics. Especially useful in PvP games. For maximum movement speed skipping is active regardless of this setting.
vcmi.adventureOptions.smoothDragging.hel:
{Smooth Map Dragging}

When enabled, map dragging has a modern run out effect.
vcmi.battleOptions.animationsSpeed1.help: Set animation speed to very slow.
vcmi.battleOptions.animationsSpeed1.hove: Set animation speed to very slow.
vcmi.battleOptions.animationsSpeed5.help: Set animation speed to very fast.
vcmi.battleOptions.animationsSpeed5.hove: Set animation speed to very fast.
vcmi.battleOptions.endWithAutocombat.hel:
{Ends battle}

Auto-Combat plays battle to end instant
vcmi.battleOptions.movementHighlightOnHo:
{Movement Highlight on Hover}

Highlight unit's movement range when you hover over it.
vcmi.battleOptions.queueSizeAutoButton.h: Automatically adjust the size of the turn order queue based on the game's resolution(SMALL size is used when playing the game on a resolution with a height lower than 700 pixels, BIG size is used otherwise).
vcmi.battleOptions.queueSizeBigButton.he: Sets turn order queue size to BIG (not supported if game resolution height is less than 700 pixels).
vcmi.battleOptions.queueSizeNoneButton.h: Do not display Turn Order Queue.
Sets turn order queue size to SMALL.
vcmi.battleOptions.rangeLimitHighlightOn:
{Show range limits for shooters on Hover}

Show shooter's range limits when you hover over it.
vcmi.battleOptions.showHealthBar.help:
{Show health bar}

Show health bar indicating remaining health before one unit dies.
vcmi.battleOptions.showQuickSpell.help:
{Show Quickspell panel}

Show panel for quick selecting spells.
vcmi.battleOptions.showStickyHeroInfoWin:
{Show heroes statistics windows}

Permanently toggle on heroes statistics windows that show primary stats and spell points.
{Skip Intro Music}

Allow actions during the intro music that plays at the beginning of each battle.
vcmi.battleWindow.accurateShot.resultDes: %d %s was killed with an accurate shot!
vcmi.battleWindow.endWithAutocombat: Are you sure you wish to end the battle with auto combat?
vcmi.battleWindow.pressKeyToSkipIntro: Press any key to start battle immediately
vcmi.broadcast.help.cheaters: '!cheaters' - list players that entered cheat command during game
vcmi.broadcast.help.kick: '!kick <player>' - kick specified player from the game
vcmi.broadcast.help.statistic: '!statistic' - save game statistics as csv file
vcmi.broadcast.help.vote: '!vote' - allows to change some game settings if all players vote for it
vcmi.broadcast.simturn.endBetween: Simultaneous turns between players %s and %s have ended
vcmi.broadcast.statisticFile: Statistic files can be found in %s directory
vcmi.broadcast.vote.abort: '!vote simturns abort' - abort simultaneous turns once this turn ends
vcmi.broadcast.vote.aborted: Player voted against change. Voting aborted
vcmi.broadcast.vote.allow: '!vote simturns allow X' - allow simultaneous turns for specified number of days, or until contact
vcmi.broadcast.vote.force: '!vote simturns force X' - force simultaneous turns for specified number of days, blocking player contacts
vcmi.broadcast.vote.hint: Type '!vote yes' to agree to this change or '!vote no' to vote against it
vcmi.broadcast.vote.start.contactsBlocke: Started voting to force simultaneous turns for %s more days
vcmi.broadcast.vote.start.nextDay: Started voting to end simultaneous turns starting from next day
vcmi.broadcast.vote.start.timer: Started voting to prolong timer for all players by %s seconds
vcmi.broadcast.vote.start.untilContacts: Started voting to allow simultaneous turns for %s more days
vcmi.broadcast.vote.success.contactsBloc: Voting successful. Simultaneous turns will run for %s more days. Contacts are blocked
vcmi.broadcast.vote.success.nextDay: Voting successful. Simultaneous turns will end on next day
vcmi.broadcast.vote.success.timer: Voting successful. Timer for all players has been prolonger for %s seconds
vcmi.broadcast.vote.success.untilContact: Voting successful. Simultaneous turns will run for %s more days, or until contact
vcmi.broadcast.vote.timer: '!vote timer prolong X' - prolong base timer for all players by specified number of seconds
vcmi.client.errors.modLoadingFailure:
{Mod loading failure}

Critical issues found when loading mods! Game may not work correctly or crash! Please update or disable following mods:
vcmi.commanderWindow.artifactMessage: Do you want to return this artifact to the hero?
vcmi.creatureWindow.returnArtifact.help: Click this button to return the artifact to the hero's backpack.
vcmi.creatureWindow.showBonuses.help: Display all active bonuses of the commander.

vcmi.optionsTab.cheatAllowed.help:
{Allow cheats}
Allows the inputs of cheats during the game.
vcmi.optionsTab.chessFieldBase.help: Used when {Turn Timer} reaches 0. Set once at game start. On reaching zero, ends current turn. Any ongoing combat with end with a loss.
vcmi.optionsTab.chessFieldBattle.help: Used in battles with AI or in pvp combat when {Unit Timer} runs out. Reset at start of each combat.
vcmi.optionsTab.chessFieldTurnAccumulate: Used out of combat or when {Battle Timer} runs out. Reset each turn. Leftover added to {Base Timer} at turn's end.
vcmi.optionsTab.chessFieldTurnDiscard.he: Used out of combat or when {Battle Timer} runs out. Reset each turn. Any unspent time is lost.
vcmi.optionsTab.chessFieldUnitAccumulate: Used when selecting unit action in pvp combat. Leftover added to {Battle Timer} at end of unit turn.
vcmi.optionsTab.chessFieldUnitDiscard.he: Used when selecting unit action in pvp combat. Reset at start of each unit's turn. Any unspent time is lost.
vcmi.optionsTab.simturnsAI.help:
{Simultaneous AI Turns}
Experimental option. Allows AI players to act at the same time as human player when simultaneous turns are enabled.
vcmi.optionsTab.simturnsMax.help: Play simultaneously for specified number of days or until contact with another player.
vcmi.optionsTab.simturnsMin.help: Play simultaneously for specified number of days. Contacts between players during this period are blocked.
vcmi.optionsTab.turnOptions.help: Select turn timer and simultaneous turns options
vcmi.optionsTab.unlimitedReplay.help:
{Unlimited battle replay}
No limit of replaying battles.
vcmi.otherOptions.availableCreaturesAsDw:

vcmi.otherOptions.creatureGrowthAsDwelli:
{Show Weekly Growth of Creatures}

Show creatures' weekly growth instead of available amount in town summary (bottom-left corner of town screen).

vcmi.systemOptions.audioMuteFocus.help:
{Mute on inactivity}

Mute audio on inactive window focus. Exceptions are ingame messages and new turn sound.
vcmi.systemOptions.enableLargeSpellbookB:
{Large Spell Book}

Enables larger spell book that fits more spells per page. Spell book page change animation does not work with this setting enabled.
vcmi.systemOptions.enableOverlayButton.h:
{Enable Overlay}

Enable overlays for showing additional infos such as building names using the ALT key or the two finger gesture.
vcmi.systemOptions.enableUiEnhancementsB:
{Interface Enhancements}

Toggle various quality of life interface improvements. Such as a backpack button etc. Disable to have a more classic experience.
{Borderless Fullscreen}

If selected, VCMI will run in borderless fullscreen mode. In this mode, game will always use same resolution as desktop, ignoring selected resolution.
vcmi.systemOptions.fullscreenExclusive.h:
{Fullscreen}

If selected, VCMI will run in exclusive fullscreen mode. In this mode, game will change resolution of monitor to selected resolution.
{Haptic feedback}

Toggle the haptic feedback on touch inputs.
vcmi.systemOptions.longTouchButton.help:
{Long Touch Interval}

When using touchscreen, popup windows will appear after touching screen for specified duration, in milliseconds.
vcmi.systemOptions.longTouchMenu.help: Change duration of long touch interval.
vcmi.systemOptions.performanceOverlayBut:
{Show Performance Overlay}

Toggle the visibility of the overlay with additional information like frames per second, time and battery charge level (if available) in the corner of the game window.
vcmi.systemOptions.scalingButton.help:
{Interface Scaling}

Changes scaling of in-game interface.

vcmi.wiki.modName.core: Heroes of Might and Magic III
vcmi.wiki.glossary.vcmi.name: VCMI
vcmi.wiki.glossary.vcmi.description:
VCMI is a complete open-source remake of Heroes of Might and Magic III, built from the ground up using modern C++. It uses the original game's graphics, sounds, and text assets, achieving near-perfect compatibility with classic Heroes 3 gameplay while offering the technical advantages of a modern engine.

Everything in VCMI has been rewritten from scratch: game file loading, graphics rendering, pathfinding, AI, battle mechanics, and the modding framework. The project aims to overcome the limitations of the original Heroes 3 engine, support popular community mods such as HotA, WoG, and HD Mod, and open up entirely new modding possibilities.

VCMI is cross-platform and runs on Windows, Linux, macOS, iOS, and Android.

{VCMI} is an acronym of the Quenya phrase {Vinyar Callor Meletyo ar Ingoleo}, meaning {New Heroes of Might and Magic}.
